data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the visibility of the date of the last inspection on the equipment tag/QR code. However, the evidence provided does not include any information confirming that this date is displayed as required. The linked use case mentions the QR code showing 'FAILED INSPECTION - DO NOT USE', but it does not specify whether the date of the last inspection is included, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence that the date of the last inspection is visible on the equipment tag/QR code.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for inspection date visibility
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence that the date of the last inspection is displayed on the equipment tag/QR code.
